message:
feat(freeze): Integrate C builder with SSACodeGen (Phase 2a)

- Import c_builder module in codegen_ssa.zig
- Add CBuilder, CValue, CodeGenContext type aliases
- Add use_builder_api flag to CodeGenOptions (default: false)
- Add builder field to SSACodeGen struct
- Add getBuilder() and getCodeGenContext() helper methods

This sets up the infrastructure for incremental migration of opcode
handlers from raw string concatenation to the structured builder API.
The flag allows testing new vs old codegen side-by-side.

Next: Migrate arithmetic opcodes (add, sub, mul, div) to use builder.
